ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hands" (
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand */,
  "player_hand" TEXT /* Cards held by the player (e.g., '8h 5h') */,
  "board_cards" TEXT /* Cards on the board (e.g., '6d Kh 7h') */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of poker game (e.g., Texas Hold'em, Omaha) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position at the table (e.g., Small Blind, Big Blind, Dealer) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Player's action (e.g., Fold, Call, Raise) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount bet by the player */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street of the hand (e.g., Pre-flop, Flop, Turn, River) */,
  "total_pot" REAL /* Total pot size at the end of the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_values" (
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the EV record */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hand record */,
  "ev_check" REAL /* Expected value if the player checks */,
  "ev_bet" REAL /* Expected value if the player bets */,
  "ev_fold" REAL /* Expected value if the player folds */,
  "ev_call" REAL /* Expected value if the player calls */,
  "ev_raise" REAL /* Expected value if the player raises */,
  "optimal_action" TEXT /* Optimal action based on the expected values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_values_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hand record */,
  "note" TEXT /* Detailed note describing the strategy or situation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., Strategy, Observation, Reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player's account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "hands_won" INTEGER /* Total number of hands won */,
  "total_bets" REAL /* Total amount bet by the player */,
  "hands_played" INTEGER /* Total number of hands played */,
  "average_bets_per_hand" REAL /* Average amount bet per hand */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Player's win rate as a percentage */,
  "ROI" REAL /* Player's return on investment */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit or loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "buy_in" REAL /* Buy-in amount for the tournament */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the tournament */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players participating in the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee paid by the player */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position in the tournament */,
  "prize_won" REAL /* Prize amount won by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hand_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hand */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning player */,
  "pot_size" REAL /* Total size of the pot for the hand */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Player's position at the table */,
  "hand_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the player's hand */,
  "hand_type" TEXT /* Type of hand (e.g., Flush, Straight, Full House) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hand_results_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hand_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_authentication" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auth record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for hashing the password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_authentication_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player making the bet */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hand involved */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., call, raise) */,
  "bet_round" TEXT /* Round of betting (e.g., Pre-flop, Flop, Turn, River) */,
  "bet_position" TEXT /* Player's position at the table during the bet */,
  "bet_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the bet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the session */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament, if applicable */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of poker game played in the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_profit" REAL /* Profit or loss for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chat_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chat message */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player sending the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., Chat, System, Announcement) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been read by the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_messages_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chat_messages_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the player */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
